creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #29)

1) Assign to committer resolving (sbruno)

Note: Committers should assign themselves as early as possible and reference PR: in commit log messages.

2) Set mfc-stableX flags to ? (means request/ask for mfc)

Committer resolving will either:

a) Set + upon MFC to that branch, or
b) Set - with comment outlining why not (unnecessary, breaks kbi, etc)
